channel.title: tui on tui theme demo
channel.description: Recent content in tui on tui theme demo

item.title: 3D Models
item.description: Lazy-loaded Three.js viewer that reads its colours from the palette.

item.title: Mermaid Diagrams
item.description: Flowcharts and sequences coloured by the site palette.

item.title: Panels
item.description: Every titled container in the theme is one parametric partial.

item.title: Layouts
item.description: Page skeleton and a small family of responsive grid classes.

item.title: Nav
item.description: Chevron-clipped bar with a title tab and link pills.

item.title: Footer
item.description: Copyright left, social links right, icon-only on mobile.

item.title: Tinted Images
item.description: Monochrome images tinted to any base16 colour with CSS mask-image.

item.title: Icons
item.description: Nerd Font glyphs looked up by name from a single data file.

item.title: Syntax Highlighting
item.description: Code blocks coloured via Chroma, mapped to the base16 palette.

item.title: Theme
item.description: Palette and typography flow from a single data file.

item.title: About
item.description: This is the about page. It’s a single top-level markdown file, rendered by layouts/_default/single.html.
